<p>The Pakistan Stock Exchange’s (PSX) benchmark KSE-100 index gained over 4,300 points during intraday trade on Wednesday, sustaining its bullish momentum for a second consecutive day.</p>
<p>The positive trend comes amid hopes that peace talks between the United States and Iran w

news.headline: China’s Xi meets Russian FM Lavrov, calls relations with Moscow ‘precious’
news.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov met with top Chinese leadership to discuss the Iran war and other concerns.
